title: Request Context, Deadlines, Cancellation, and Cleanup · Systems Transfer
summary: An independent service team receives a different API, load, trust, persistence, and failure constraint and must transfer request context, deadlines, cancellation, and cleanup into a new deadline budget and cancellation propagation trace. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of deadline budget and cancellation propagation trace with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evid…
objectives: Trace when an incoming request context is canceled and pass it through every request-scoped operation without storing it in long-lived structs.
Allocate caller deadline across validation, database, outbound dependency, response, and cleanup reserves instead of stacking independent full timeouts.
Distinguish client cancellation, server deadline, dependency timeout, shutdown, overload, and internal failure for response and observability decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Commit to the mission model · Lab Request Context Lifecycle
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab team handles case 5250 in a civic incident API behind one trusted regional proxy. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive a dependency budget while reserving time for cancellation cleanup; then cancel during the dependency phase and preserve cleanup plus response ownership. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Go server Commit to the mission model · Lab Request Context Lifecycle.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace when an incoming request context is canceled and pass it through every request-scoped operation without storing it in long-lived structs. For Go server Commit to the mission model · Lab Request Context Lifecycle, keep Request Context Lifecycle connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
